title: Until the Sun Grows Cold: Persisting Nuclear Dangers in a Complacent World
summary: Presented as a Plenary Lecture at the 55th Pugwash Conference on Science and World Affairs "60 Years After Hiroshima and Nagasaki"22-27 July 2005, Hiroshima, Japan.
body: Note Presented as a Plenary Lecture at the 55th Pugwash Conference on Science and World Affairs "60 Years After Hiroshima and Nagasaki" 22-27 July 2005, Hiroshima, Japan.
